content.full_text:
August 7, 2002

Charles Walker, Executive Director
City of San Diego Ethics Commission
1010 Second Ave., Ste. 1530
San Diego, CA 92101

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-193

Dear Mr. Walker:

This is to confirm that, per our telephone conversation of July 31, 2002, you have withdrawn your request for advice relating to the City of San Diego’s Election Campaign Control Ordinance. Please let me know if this is not your understanding or if you need additional assistance.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Carla Wardlow
Chief, Technical Assistance Division
